description_long: This is a geodesic dome-style tent with a faceted, polygonal exterior composed of multiple triangular panels, giving it a modern, angular appearance. The tent is primarily dark gray to black in color, with subtle variations in shading across its surface. A main entrance is visible as a triangular opening on one side, accompanied by a small rectangular mat or groundsheet in front of it. The structure appears to be supported by an internal or integrated pole system, as no external poles are visible. The tent's surface has a matte, slightly reflective finish, suggesting it is made from synthetic waterproof fabric. There are no visible windows, mesh panels, or external guy lines, giving the tent a minimalist and robust look.
description: A dark, faceted geodesic dome tent with a triangular entrance and a sleek, modern appearance. The tent features a matte, slightly reflective surface and minimal external details.
description_view_0: The tent is seen from a side angle, showing its polygonal dome shape and the absence of visible entrances or external features.
description_view_1: This view reveals the front of the tent, with a triangular entrance and a small rectangular mat or groundsheet extending outward.
description_view_2: The tent is shown from a rear-side angle, highlighting the triangular entrance and the mat, with the rest of the dome's faceted surface visible.
description_view_3: A rear view of the tent, showing the continuous faceted surface and the mat positioned to the left, with no visible openings.
attribute_entrance_type: Triangular flap entrance located at the front, with a small rectangular mat or groundsheet extending outward; no visible zippers or mesh.
attribute_guy_line_configuration: No external guy lines are visible; the tent appears to rely on an internal or integrated pole structure.
